headline: Is It Time To Reassess Ameren (AEE) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Ameren at US$106.36 is giving you fair value for your money, or if the current price is out of line with what the business may be worth. The stock is up 5.5% year to date and 10.6% over the past year, although it has fallen 3.3% in the last week and 5.6% over the last month. These moves can affect how you think about both upside potential and risk. Recent coverage around Ameren has focused on its role as a regulated utility in the US power grid and ongoing interest in companies...
